name: LUZHENG FUTURES Company Limited
summary: LUZHENG FUTURES Company Limited, a futures company, provides brokerage services for commodity and financial futures in the People's Republic of China. The company's Futures Brokerage segment offers futures brokerage and financial futures brokering services. Its Commodity Trading and Risk Management segment provides physical commodity trading, futures trading, and over-the-counter derivatives trading. The company's Futures Asset Management segment offers portfolio management and maintenance; investment advisory; and transaction execution services. Its Treasury and Others segment is involved in treasury operations. LUZHENG FUTURES Company Limited also engages in the sale and wholesale of agricultural and metal products, metallurgical materials, mineral products, precious metals, chemical products, and edible oil, as well as electronic products, office automation equipment, computers, cultural office machinery, control equipment, and machine room equipment; import and export activities; and provision of technical consultation, investment consultancy, technical services of computer network products and software, and capital risk management services. In addition, it provides software development, computer information system integration, and information technology services, as well as electronic engineering design and construction services. The company has a strategic agreement with Taishan Property & Casualty Insurance Co., Ltd. The company was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Jinan, the People's Republic of China. LUZHENG FUTURES Company Limited is a subsidiary of Zhongtai Securities Co., Ltd.
